Texts.Guide:1: 1/4 First thing you see is main menu. First button is — «My to dos 📝». Here you can write down or review all your plans. Next button is «Reminders 🔈». Here you can schedule a reminder or review upcomming ones.
Texts.Guide:2: 2/4 Next button you can see is «Reports 📑». Here you can view a graph of how your mood changed throughout the week and check your statistics. Click «Statistics 📈» to see: - how many todo items are finished; - how many reminders received. Or view a graph of mood changes. Now, you're probably wondering: "How is this graph constructed?" Answer is very simple! Every day I'll suggest you to rate your mood on a 10-point scale, and at the end of the week I'll send you a chart. If you wish, you can always view it yourself by clicking «Mood swings chart 🤔»
Texts.Guide:3: 3/4 You can suggest your creative ideas for improvement by clicking the button «Suggest 💡»
Texts.Guide:4: 4/4 The last button you can see is «Settings ⚙️». here you can choose prefered language and set your time zone. Important! I use this information to understand when to send you reminders. You probably don't want to set a reminder for 5:00 PM and receive it at night, right? Be sure to indicate your time zone!
Texts.Guide:Menu: I hope this helped you understand the functionality and what I can do for you. So see you later 🌒
